results.title: Lookup: Ask Video Anything | Product Hunt
results.content:
We store results in:

– Object DB: what + where

– Temporal DB: when + order

Together, video becomes queryable like a database. See once, remember forever.

Who it’s for:

⚡ Product / FDE / Dev teams — add “eyes” to your app, build your app workflow on top of vision.

Why now: Cameras are everywhere. Storage is cheap. What’s missing is a layer that makes video useful for any product. Lookup is that layer.

Who we are:

We’re second-time founders in video AI.

– At OurEye.ai (YC W22) we scaled to 1,500+ deployments.

– At AvairSense, our AI camera hit 1,000+ homes.

We learned one thing: computer vision only wins when it disappears into the workflow. Lookup is that lesson, turned into a platform.

Playground: [...] Report

Omkar Ingale

This looks cool!! Can we run this over a live stream of video and get structured output for further processing?

Report

Ajay Kumar

Velo

Velo

Maker

@tt\_omkar Yup, you can run it on live streams using a RTSP link, and for output format, you can define your own structured output format or just get plain text answers

Report

hey amazing product I often use Gemini 2.5 pro video understanding for the same task, I dint get it is it open source? if commercial how your API pricing fares against other LLMs

Report

Ajay Kumar

Velo

Velo

Maker

Thanks @vatsmi , Lookup isn’t open source, it’s a commercial API. Pricing is competitive with LLMs, and unlike them we support unlimited memory understanding
